phrases.intent_en: Ask if your timed ticket is valid now
phrases.text_local: Mon billet horodaté est valable maintenant ?
phrases.pronunciation: mon bee-YAY oh-roh-dah-TAY eh vah-LAH-bluh man-tuh-NON
phrases.cultural_note: Timed tickets are typically enforced. Arrive a bit early and keep your confirmation ready.

responses.english: Yes, it's valid. What time is your slot?
responses.phonetic: wee, say bon. voo ah-VAY voter cray-NOH ah kel UR
responses.local: Oui, c'est bon. Vous avez votre créneau à quelle heure ?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pyramid entrance queue starts
phrases.text_local: La file pour l'entrée Pyramide commence où ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah feel poor lan-TRAY pee-rah-MEED koh-MONS oo
phrases.cultural_note: The Pyramid is the best-known entrance; alternate entrances can be quicker depending on crowd flow.

responses.english: The line starts in front of the Pyramid, on the right.
responses.phonetic: lah feel koh-MONS duh-VAHN lah pee-rah-MEED, sur lah drwaht
responses.local: La file commence devant la Pyramide, sur la droite.

phrases.text_local: Où sont les vestiaires, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay ves-tee-AIR, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Large bags may need to be checked. Cloakroom use can speed up security and gallery access.

responses.english: The cloakrooms are in the basement, near the Pyramid entrance.
responses.phonetic: lay ves-tee-AIR sohn toh soo-sol, preh duh lan-TRAY pee-rah-MEED
responses.local: Les vestiaires sont au sous-sol, près de l'entrée Pyramide.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when last entry is today
phrases.text_local: La dernière entrée est à quelle heure aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah der-NYEHR an-TRAY eh tah kel UR oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Last admission is earlier than closing; verify same-day hours before planning a late visit.

responses.english: Last entry is at 5:30 PM today.
responses.phonetic: lah der-NYEHR an-TRAY eh tah say-tahn-oor oo-zhoor-DWEE
responses.local: La dernière entrée est à 17h30 aujourd'hui.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the quickest route to the Mona Lisa
phrases.text_local: Quel est le chemin le plus rapide vers la Joconde ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh leh shuh-MAN leh ploo rah-PEED vair lah zhoh-KOND
phrases.cultural_note: Staff can suggest traffic-light routes when one wing is congested.

responses.english: Take the stairs to the right, then follow the signs to the Denon wing.
responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY les-kah-lee-YAY ah drwaht, pwee swee-VAY lay pah-NOH vehr lel duh-NOHN
responses.local: Prenez l'escalier à droite, puis suivez les panneaux vers l'aile Denon.
